steps.text: Let's make the number three! Press + on group A to add fruit.
Keep pressing + until the total shows 3!
steps.feedback: Three! Count them — one, two, three.

steps.text: Tap the big number on the right to count them all!
Can you make the number five? Use groups A and B — they add together to make the total!
Press + on A or B until the total shows 5!
steps.feedback: Five! How did you split them between A and B?

steps.text: Now tap the big number to count all five!
Can you make group A and group B the same? When they match, they're equal!
Use + and − to make A and B equal!
steps.feedback: They match! When two groups are the same we say they're equal.

steps.text: Tap the big number to count them all!
steps.feedback: Equal groups — and you counted them too!

steps.text: Ten is a special number! Can you fill both groups to make ten altogether?
Press + on A and B until the total shows 10!
Now tap the big number and count all the way to ten!
Let's explore! The + button adds one, the − button takes one away. Let's try them out!
Press + on group A to add one!
steps.feedback: A grew bigger! + adds one each time.
B grew too! Now press − to take one away.

steps.text: Press − on A to take one away!
steps.feedback: A got smaller! When a group has less we say it has fewer.

text: You explored adding and taking away. Brilliant!
